en_definition: an advisor
that cannot be clearly seen, heard or smelt
the line that goes around the edge of something, showing its main shape but not the details
the machinery and electronic parts of a computer system
very small in degree
a piece of wire that is covered with plastic, used for carrying electricity to a piece of equipment
a unit for measuring length, equal to 2.54 centimetres
zh_definition: 英寸（长度单位，等于 2.54 厘米）

en_definition: coming or existing between two events, dates, objects, etc.
zh_definition: 发生于其间的；介于中间的

en_definition: happening before the normal or expected time
zh_definition: 未成熟的；过早的；提前的

en_definition: a tube through which liquids and gases can flow
be developing from a child into an adult
a young person who is developing from a child into an adult
a stage; a period
made to appear to exist by the use of computer software, for example on the Internet
almost or very nearly the thing described, so that any slight difference is not important
zh_definition: （通过计算机软件，如在互联网上）模拟的，虚拟的

en_definition: (underlay, underlain) to be the basis or cause of something
zh_definition: 构成......的基础；作为......的原因

en_definition: a ball of air or gas in a liquid, or a ball of air inside a solid substance such as glass
to reach an opinion or decide that something is true on the basis of information that is available
any material that produces heat or power, usually when it is burnt
an area of knowledge or activity, especially ones that somebody is responsible for
zh_definition: ( 知识、活动的 ) 领域，范围，范畴

en_definition: a gas that is the lightest of all the elements
a particular way of doing something
(broadcast, broadcast) to send out programmes on television or radio
a radio or television programme
zh_definition: 播送（电视或无线电节目）

en_definition: based on facts, not on ideas or guesses
to create a plan or an idea
(of a young bird, fish, insect, etc.) to come out of an egg
a chemical, usually a liquid, that contains hydrogen and has a pH of less than seven
a machine for producing electricity
a piece of equipment shaped like a tube, containing lenses, that you look through to make objects that are far away appear larger and nearer
to happen before something or come before something / somebody in order
zh_definition: 在......之前发生（或出现）；先于

en_definition: a substance used as a medicine or used in a medicine
either of the two round soft parts at the front of a woman's body that produce milk when she has had a baby
expert knowledge or skill in a particular subject, activity or job
time that is spent doing what you enjoy when you are not working or studying
used especially in newspapers, etc. to mean 'prime minister'
most important, famous or successful
zh_definition: 首要的；最著名的；最成功的；第一的

en_definition: to give things to a large number of people; to share something between a number of people
not suitable or proper in a particular situation
the act of remembering who somebody is when you see them, or of identifying what something is
the act of accepting that something exists, is true or is official
to produce an exact copy of an animal or a plant from its cells
the force that attracts objects in space towards each other, and that on the Earth pulls them towards the centre of the planet, so that things fall to the ground when they are dropped
to make a judgement about the nature or quality of somebody / something
a book containing lists of information, usually in alphabetical order, for example people's telephone numbers or the names and addresses of businesses in a particular area
zh_definition: 名录；电话号码簿；公司名录

en_definition: to show something clearly by giving proof or evidence
to show and explain how something works or how to do something
to spend money on something in order to make it better or more successful
to buy property, shares in a company, etc. in the hope of making a profit
the act of making a piece of machinery, computer system, etc. more powerful and efficient
zh_definition: （机器、计算机系统等）升级；提高；改进

en_definition: a curved path followed by a planet or an object as it moves around another planet, star, moon, etc.
to move in a path around a much larger object, especially a planet, star, etc.
the whole of space and everything in it, including the Earth, the planets and the stars
extremely large in area, size, amount, etc.
zh_definition: 辽阔的；巨大的；庞大的；大量的

en_definition: to do something next, after having done something else first
the small hard part produced by a plant, from which a new plant can grow
making new discoveries; using new methods
zh_definition: 开创性的；创新的；革新的

en_definition: a person whose job involves travelling and working in a spacecraft
an impressive thing that is done or achieved after a lot of work
a cup made of tin
to create a situation in which it is easier for someone to do something or something to happen
